heading: Omitted
label: 79 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , ; , , ; , , , which authorized the Secretary of the Interior to permit the use of rights-of-way through the public lands, forest and other reservations of the United States, and the Yosemite, Sequoia, and General Grant National Parks, California, for various public utility purposes, was omitted in view of the repeal of its provisions by as they relate to public lands and lands in the National Forest System and by as they relate to National Park System units. See , National Park Service and Related Programs. Act , is also classified to , Public Lands, and was also classified to prior to its omission from the Code.
